name: io.github.search-atlas-group/searchatlas
title: SearchAtlas
description: SearchAtlas AI Agent (v2) — stdio bridge to the SearchAtlas Streamable-HTTP MCP server at https://mcp.searchatlas.com/mcp/. Exposes 500+ tools for OTTO SEO, PPC, content, site explorer, Google Business Profile, local SEO, digital PR, keyword research, LLM visibility, and more.

environmentVariables.name: SEARCHATLAS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key authentication (alternative to JWT token)

environmentVariables.name: SEARCHATLAS_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the SearchAtlas v2 MCP endpoint (defaults to https://mcp.searchatlas.com/mcp)

tools.name: otto_list_projects
tools.description: List OTTO SEO projects — technical SEO automation, schema markup, on-page optimizations

tools.name: ppc_list_accounts
tools.description: List Google Ads accounts — PPC campaigns, bids, performance

tools.name: cg_list_articles
tools.description: Content Genius — AI-generated articles, blog posts, landing pages

tools.name: se_list_sites
tools.description: Site Explorer — audit, crawl data, backlinks, competitive intelligence

tools.name: gbp_get_business_categories
tools.description: Google Business Profile — listings, reviews, local SEO (96 tools)

tools.name: local_seo_heatmaps_get_heatmap_details
tools.description: Local SEO heatmaps — geographic rank tracking across competitor locations

tools.name: ll_list_projects
tools.description: Link Laboratory — link building orders, authority signals, outreach

tools.name: dpr_list_campaigns
tools.description: Digital PR — campaigns, press releases, authority outreach

tools.name: llmv_list_projects
tools.description: LLM Visibility — track AI model references to your brand

tools.name: krt_list_projects
tools.description: Keyword Rank Tracking — monitor positions, SERP analysis, clustering

tools.name: bv_list
tools.description: Brand Vault — AI content settings, brand voice, knowledge base

tools.name: ws_list_projects
tools.description: Website Studio — page builder, layouts, site structure

tools.name: gsc_get_sites
tools.description: Google Search Console — property list, page/keyword performance

tools.name: social_hub_list_posts
tools.description: Social Hub — manage and schedule social media posts

tools.name: cs_list_templates
tools.description: Content Strategy — templates, plans, editorial calendars

tools.name: kg_list
tools.description: Knowledge Graph — entities used in press release and cloud stack content

tools.name: dkn_list_nodes
tools.description: Domain Knowledge Network — interlinked content hubs

tools.name: indexer_submit_batch
tools.description: Indexer — batch URL submission and indexing status

tools.name: rb_list_reports
tools.description: Report Builder — SEO and performance reports

tools.name: pr_list
tools.description: Press Release workflow — drafting, publishing, distribution
